title: Day 6 Lesson 1 ( Video )Talking about plans for the spring vacation
html:
Day 6 - Lesson 1

はるやすみの　よていを　はなす  (haruyasumino yotee o hanasu) = Talking about plans for the spring vacation

ばしょ (Location): きょうしつ (kyooshitsu) = classroom

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): あんなさん、りんさん りゅうがくせい　ふたり (Anna-san, Lin-san ryuugaksee hutari) = Anna-san, Lin-san 2 study abroad students)

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
